sizing_rule.note: Position size via optimal f calculation per trade date; requires both AHPR and GHPR > 1.0 for positive expectation. Optimal f value is date-specific and converges with larger sample sizes. Wider standard deviation windows (longer option duration, minimal time decay) expand opportunity for positive expectation on long options due to asymmetric payoff.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be based on optimal f value that maximizes both AHPR (Arithmetic HPR) and GHPR (Geometric HPR) while ensuring positive expectation exists, with wider standard deviation windows expanding opportunity for positive expectation in long options due to fixed downside and unlimited upside.
